name: Tsultrim Allione
bio: Lama Tsultrim Allione is an American teacher of Tibetan Buddhism and the founder of Tara Mandala retreat center in Pagosa Springs, Colorado. She was one of the first American women ordained as a Tibetan Buddhist nun in 1970 and was later recognized as a reincarnation of the 11th-century Tibetan yogini Machig Labdrön. She is known for reviving the practice of Chöd and developing the Feeding Your Demons method. Her books include 'Women of Wisdom,' 'Feeding Your Demons,' and 'Wisdom Rising.'
